character_dossiers.name: squire
character_dossiers.biography: Discussed Blackbeard Flint's reputation and expressed eagerness to find treasure.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Examined a book and map, cut stitches with medical scissors, and analyzed financial records.

character_dossiers.name: captain
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in context of a thimble found in his pocket.
